name: config_doc
description: Generate config reference doc and validation script — structured as 3 user turns to exercise proxy context assembly
task_prompt:
TURN 1 OF 3

Read archolith_proxy/config.py in full. List every field name defined in the Settings class, with its type and default value. Do not create any files yet. Just output the list and stop.

follow_up_turns.message:
TURN 2 OF 3

Create docs/config_reference.md. Use a markdown table with one row per Settings field. Columns: Setting Name, Type, Default, Description. Include every field. The file must have at least 40 lines.

Do not modify any existing file.

TURN 3 OF 3

Create scripts/validate_config.py that:
- Reads a .env file path from argv[1] (default: ".env")
- Checks that UPSTREAM_API_KEY, UPSTREAM_BASE_URL, EXTRACTOR_API_KEY, EXTRACTOR_BASE_URL, and UPSTREAM_MAX_RETRIES are all set and non-empty
- Prints a PASS/FAIL line for each key, then a final summary line
- Exits 0 if all pass, 1 if any fail

Do not modify any existing file.

checkpoints.description: Config reference markdown exists with all settings
Validation script exists and contains required keys
